task_completion.description: Open and read the band requirements text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor window displaying 'band_requirements.txt' with the stage layout specifications and the 10-channel input list.

task_completion.description: Create a stage plot in draw.io including all band members/instruments.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The draw.io interface showing a diagram with shapes or text labels for Drums, Bass, Guitar, Keys, and Vocals.

task_completion.description: Include AC Power drops and Monitor Wedges in the stage plot.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Shapes, icons, or text labels explicitly indicating 'AC Power' (or power drops) and 'Monitor Wedges' (or monitors) on the stage plot in draw.io.

task_completion.description: Arrange the stage plot with correct spatial orientation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Drums positioned at the top of the diagram (Upstage), Lead Vocals at the bottom (Downstage), with Bass and Guitar positioned on opposite sides (Stage Right/Left).

task_completion.description: Create a 10-channel Input List table in the diagram.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A table or structured list within the draw.io canvas containing 10 numbered channels, with columns or sections for 'Instrument' and 'Mic/DI'.

task_completion.description: Save the diagram as a .drawio file and export it as a .png file to the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Save/Export dialogs in draw.io targeting the Desktop with filenames 'midnight_alibi_rider.drawio' and 'midnight_alibi_rider.png', or a file manager showing these files on the Desktop.

integrity.description: The agent used the draw.io graphical interface to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with the draw.io application (menus, toolbars, canvas), rather than terminal commands generating XML or image files directly.

integrity.description: The stage plot and input list were manually assembled in the diagramming tool.
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of shapes being dragged, text being typed into shapes/tables, and layout adjustments occurring within draw.io.

integrity.description: The agent did not download a pre-made stage plot from the internet.
integrity.visual_evidence: No web browser windows open searching for or downloading existing stage plots or input lists.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The band requirements specify a 10-channel input list with specific mic models (e.g., Shure Beta 91A, SM57, Sennheiser e604, e906, Radial J48, Electro-Voice RE20, Radial ProD2, Shure Beta 58A). The stage plot must have Drums at the rear/upstage (top), Lead Vocals at the front/downstage (bottom), Bass stage right, and Guitar stage left. Files must be saved to /home/ga/Desktop as midnight_alibi_rider.drawio and midnight_alibi_rider.png.
